title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the "Tribhuvan" Sahkari University Act, 2025. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint: Provided that different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act and any reference in any such provision to the commencement of this Act shall be construed as a reference to the coming into force of that provision.
footnote: 1. 5th day of April, 2025, vide notification No. S.O. 1619 (E), dated 4th day of April, 2025, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
